author: adriangonz
text: Move inference servers and clients to root folder

author: adriangonz
text:
Same as we have the `python/` folder with the Python client and inference server, it would be good to have root-level folders for every other language implementation.

For example, for Java this would mean adding a `java/` folder containing the inference server currently under `incubating/java` and potentially a client (as with Python). Same for Go and other languages.

This would make it easier and cleaner to manage each language's implementation (since all relevant code would be centralised), and it would increase visibility over which languages we support (either as stable or as "incubating").
